title: Modded Coffee GUI
description: An addon to Dark Coffee GUI to add mod support
body:
# Modded Coffee GUI

[![Modrinth](https://imgur.com/2thX8gE.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-coffee-gui) [![Curseforge](https://imgur.com/BBPSAq4.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/modded-coffee-gui) [![Twitter](https://imgur.com/qfz2Uz7.png)](https://x.com/restless_pip?s=20) [![Kofi](https://imgur.com/EWBrs6h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/restlesspip)


This is an addon that adds mod support to Dark Coffee GUI. I'll update the resourcepack slowly adding 3 to 5 mods at a time. If there is a mod that you'd like me to add or there is an issue with one of the supported mods please let me know by making an issue on Github!!

## Compatibility

The main versions I test are 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, it should work on other versions as long as the mod you want doesn't change file structure between versions. If you are using it on a different version and one of the mods doesn't seem to work as intended (read the "Notes / Problems" part at the end to check if the problem is known) make an issue on Github and I'll see what I can do.

The pack only has the compat with mods, if you want the vanilla changes you'll have to install the original resourcepack. Make sure to place the pack above the original.

![Resourcepack Order](https://imgur.com/QA3PRKr.png)

Check out the original resourcepack!!

[![DarkCoffeeGUI](https://imgur.com/LhrWkMT.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-coffe-gui)

## Updates

For now I work alone, so updates may take a while. If you'd like to help me, my discord is restless_pip and my mail is restless.pip@gmail.com

## Mod list

Here's a list of all the mods that are either done or will come in the future. This list is not final, more mods will come in the future once I'm done with everything in the current list.

ЁЯЯй = Done

ЁЯФ╕ = In progress/Next Update

тмЫ = Not Done

ЁЯЯи = Has Notes/Problems

ЁЯЯе = Doesn't Work / Not Compatible

<details>
<summary>Unsuported</summary>
  
**Accesorify**: Can't get the textures to work, if anyone knows what the problem is and has a solution let me know on the issues page in github.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Notes / Problems</summary>

**Modular Backpacks**: For some reason I had to restart Minecraft after installing the resourcepack in order for Modular Backpacks to use it's textures. If you have the same problem just restart Minecraft and it should work.

**REI, JEI, EMI**: Due to how they made the textures (mainly EMI maximizing space) the style is more squared than normal and they donтАЩt have the secondary interior line. The coffee pattern from the background is also missing since they are all built with resizing in mind. ItтАЩs also not guaranteed that it works with every mod, since some mods add different crafting interfaces so if some are missing let me know. From the three IтАЩd recommend EMI, it gets closer to the style and doesn't have any inconsistencies or missing textures. JEI works but is not as polished and REI has a couple of errors that I canтАЩt fix.

**JEI**: All textures work but there might be some inconsistencies to the main style (mainly the buttons), so some mixels (pixels of different sizes) are present.

**REI**: Buttons that are too small display broken. Some textures are not done with images so I can't modify them: the category name and number remains grey and some recolors like the show craftables button colors the entire square instead of just the button. I would recommend using a different recipe viewer mod.

**Backpacked, Inmis, Resource Backpack's**: The coffee pattern from the background is missing.

**LevelZ, Jobs and Party Addon**: The text isn't affected by the shader on the original pack so it remains grey.

**TravelerтАЩs Backpack**: The scrollbar canтАЩt be changed and remains grey.

**Sophisticated Backpacks**: The scrollbar and search icon canтАЩt be changed and remain grey.

</details>
